rules_followed: did not change Visual Signature semantics
summary: Phase 1 is coherent and safe to proceed from. README and CONTRIBUTING describe the unified project and separation guardrails. .gitignore protects local data/caches without hiding current source, prompts, docs, or required examples. .env.example uses placeholders only.

notes: Prompt changes are treated as source changes.
Scoring/rubric files are called out as sensitive.
Visual Signature is described as evidence-only.
Contributors are told not to mutate dimension_scores from Visual Signature.
Read-only platform routes are protected from provider execution/runtime mutation.

gitignore_does_not_hide_source_prompts_d.future_caveat: Global *.sqlite, *.sqlite3, and *.db ignores are safe now because no tracked DB fixtures were found. Add explicit exceptions if future tests require SQLite fixtures.

notes: README marks output/** as local/generated runtime output.
CONTRIBUTING says local runtime output should not be committed by default.
.gitignore ignores output/.
data/ is ignored.
SQLite DB, WAL, and SHM files are ignored.
README says data/brand3.sqlite3 is local runtime data.
CONTRIBUTING says private local database files should never be committed.
No tracked SQLite/DB fixture files were found.
sqlite_local_db_policy_safe.future_caveat: Add allowlist exceptions if synthetic DB fixtures are introduced.

notes: .gitignore does not bulk-ignore examples/visual_signature/**.
README explains that Visual Signature examples are mixed source/generated artifacts.
CONTRIBUTING asks contributors to classify generated artifacts and document ambiguity.
Workflow asks reviewers to identify affected layer.
Workflow separates prompt changes from rubric changes.
Workflow requires version bump/introduction when semantics/cache behavior changes.
Workflow asks for tests, snapshots, or rationale.
prompt_editing_workflow_clear.followup: Create docs/prompts.md as the full prompt registry in a later phase.

findings.title: README environment list is not complete
findings.details: README lists common variables but omits some local app/development variables present in .env.example and code, including BRAND3_MAX_CONCURRENT_ANALYSES, BRAND3_ANALYSIS_TIMEOUT_SECONDS, rate-limit settings, BRAND3_BASE_URL, and BRAND3_ENVIRONMENT.
findings.impact: Low; .env.example contains the missing variables, so local setup remains possible.
findings.recommendation: Add docs/environment.md in the next docs phase as the complete env reference.

findings.title: Global SQLite ignore needs future fixture exception if DB fixtures are added
findings.impact: Low today; no tracked SQLite/DB fixtures were found.
findings.recommendation: If future tests need SQLite fixtures, add explicit allowlist exceptions such as !tests/fixtures/**/*.sqlite3.

recommendation: Proceed to the next phase with the low-risk follow-ups recorded.
